    def eligible_for_advanced_training(self) -> bool:
        return (
            self.gender in ['female', 'non-binary', 'transgender'] and
            self.age >= 45 and
            self.race in ['black', 'hispanic', 'indian'] and
            self.employment_status == 'employed' and
            self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and
            self.marital_status in ['single', 'divorced', 'legally separated'] and
            self.religion != 'christianity' and
            self.years_of_experience >= 10 and
            self.training_courses_completed == 'yes'
        )
